title: BEM-869 context roadmap scan
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
low = text.lower()
if 'next:' in low:
    status = 'NEXT_MARKER_PRESENT'
else:
    status = 'NEXT_MARKER_MISSING'
# Create a compact tail marker for the next actor to inspect.
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM869_CONTEXT_ROADMAP_SCAN_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-869 context roadmap scan\nStatus: ' + status + '\nContext exists: ' + str(ctx.exists()) + '\n\nTail:\n' + text[-5000:] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM869 scanned AGENT_CONTEXT roadmap tail: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
